blended.narrative: Afton Alps is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 15 inches of snowfall of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 141 ft. Looking ahead, 20 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 13" of heavy snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 26°F, winds around 21 mph. Expect powder.
Wednesday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
